title: Paramount clinches Warner Bros deal after Netflix walks away
description: Streaming company’s decision ends months-long battle to buy parent of CNN, HBO and franchises like Harry Potter
content: Streaming company’s decision ends months-long battle to buy parent of CNN, HBO and franchises like Harry Potter
